description: Cenit is an integration-platform-as-a-service (iPaaS) for connecting cloud and on-premise systems, orchestrating data flows, and managing APIs and data transformations. Its public developer surface is a REST API for managing integration resources such as connections, flows, webhooks, schedulers, and schemas.
summary: Cenit exposes one documented REST API at `https://cenit.io/api/v1`, described by a public Swagger/OpenAPI spec, and it authenticates with a required pair of custom headers: `X-User-Access-Key` plus `X-User-Access-Token`.
